previewSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 280 180' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='280' height='180' fill='#000'/><ellipse cx='140' cy='90' rx='60' ry='90' fill='rgba(100,100,255,0.12)' filter='url(#idblur)'/><defs><filter id='idblur'><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation='20'/></filter></defs><rect x='100' y='8' width='80' height='164' rx='20' fill='#1c1c1e' stroke='#2a2a2a' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='106' y='14' width='68' height='152' rx='16' fill='#d0d0d0' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='106' y='14' width='68' height='152' rx='16' fill='#b8b8b8' opacity='0.5'/><rect x='124' y='18' width='32' height='10' rx='5' fill='#000'/><rect x='120' y='158' width='40' height='5' rx='2.5' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.35)'/></svg>

name: Multi Device
description: Desktop + mobile simultâneos, mostra design responsivo

name: Browser Premium

name: Landing Highlight

name: Before / After
